skills.name: Incident Triage
skills.description: A skill for systematically triaging production incidents - gather context, assess severity, propose containment

skills.name: Auto-Test
skills.description: Universal testing principles for writing, reviewing, or diagnosing any automated test regardless of scope or framework

skills.name: Unit Test
skills.description: Writing and reviewing unit tests that test a single function, class, or module in isolation with all external dependencies replaced by test doubles

skills.name: Integration Test
skills.description: Writing and reviewing tests that verify a real integration boundary such as database queries, message queue interactions, or external service calls

skills.name: E2E Test
skills.description: Writing and reviewing end-to-end tests that verify observable user-facing behaviour through the full stack with no mocks

skills.name: Contract Test
skills.description: Writing and reviewing contract tests that verify the agreement between a service consumer and a service provider

skills.name: Performance Test
skills.description: Writing and reviewing performance tests that measure latency, throughput, resource utilisation, or scalability under load

skills.name: Repo Init
skills.description: Interactive repo setup wizard for initializing a new repository, setting up project conventions, configuring dev tooling, and choosing tech stack

skills.name: AI Config
skills.description: Manage AI assistant config files across tools - initializing AI configs for a new repo, detecting drift between multiple co-existing AI config files

prompts.name: Incident Commander
prompts.description: An agent role for coordinating incident response across multiple specialists

prompts.name: Status Update
prompts.description: A prompt template for incident status updates

flows.name: War Room Triage
flows.description: Multi-role incident triage: Commander, Recent Changes, App, Infra, Data layers
